title: Specific Aims — MSU Examples
content: Compendium of Specific Aims page examples drawn from successful MSU grant proposals. Distributed by ORA as a companion resource to Farin Kamangar's 2023-02-13 New Faculty Development Seminar 'Specific Aims'. Provides MSU-specific worked examples that new faculty can use as a starting model for their own Specific Aims drafting.
